purpose: Fix the exact theory, graph, public-callable, pre-existing-test, and producer-precedent identities that later P2-I3 realization work may consume, without selecting a realization or upgrading source evidence.
evidence_effect: Accepted exact source identity and bounded role authority only. P2-I3-SOURCE-ADMISSION-GATE is passed; no realization or scientific authority follows.

reflexive_coherence_agentic_ecology.role: I02 entry authority and current RCAE theory-source identity

rcae_theory.role: Exact committed identity for the four RCAE conceptual sources

historical_source_authority.role: Ground the four historical P1 RCAE-paper digests without changing their original admission or claims.

graph_source_admissions.consumption_boundary: Package metadata, public exports, and compatibility facade only; these identities do not select an implementation.
Common state, snapshot, save, reset, and rebase contracts only.
May constrain or supply a later registered native option. Admission does not bridge synchronous GRC and event-time LGRC, select a carrier, or make a missing lifecycle native.

GRC9V3 full-step and continuity behavior may support a separately identified comparative or interesting result only. Its different per-step evolution and relaxation semantics cannot replace, bridge, or satisfy the required LGRC9V3 realization.
Distance and timing surfaces are later measurement options. They are not traversal response and do not establish an operational shortcut.
Native restoration identity may cover admitted PyGRC state only. Any RCAE field, producer, intervention, or policy state remains externally composed.
The post-hoc pheromone classifier is admitted only as an explicit non-live-field exclusion and cannot enter realization or response.
Pre-existing generic conformance only; no test fixture or outcome becomes P2-I3 calibration, candidate evidence, or a registered value.
Accepted graph claim boundaries only; no closeout prose upgrades a missing field, local response, intervention, or participant-role surface.

theory_source_admissions.role: Support-derived space, induced geometry, state-indexed distance, and geometric-versus-operational separation
theory_source_admissions.consumption_boundary: Theory and interpretation only; no runtime capability, equation, traversal response, or L03 result.

theory_source_admissions.role: State-to-geometry transition and observation-first developmental method
theory_source_admissions.consumption_boundary: May guide interpretation and next moves; cannot fix a predicted class or runtime mechanism.

theory_source_admissions.role: Local differentiation, support, ecology, and claim-boundary vocabulary
theory_source_admissions.consumption_boundary: No native agency, collective identity, implemented ecology, or domain runtime follows.

theory_source_admissions.role: Medium as condition of routes, traces, boundaries, and later possibilities
theory_source_admissions.consumption_boundary: Does not supply implemented stigmergy, coordination, or a live field.

theory_source_admissions.role: Surface, perturbation, persistence, saturation, withdrawal, and hidden-controller method
theory_source_admissions.consumption_boundary: Method source only; not a PyGRC runtime specification or proof of an adequate trail field.
Cannot force the predicted developmental or scientific class.
Cannot authorize a rung above retained evidence.

theory_source_admissions.role: Separate observed appearance from the next condition to change
theory_source_admissions.consumption_boundary: Does not predefine the next developmental answer or permit post-outcome threshold tuning.

source_transitions.effect: P2-I3 consumes the current committed theory text; P1 historical admission and claims remain unchanged.
P2-I3 consumes the current committed theory text; P1 historical admission and claims remain unchanged.
P2-I3 consumes the current committed theory text; P1 historical admission and claims remain unchanged.
P2-I3 consumes the current committed method text; P1 historical admission and claims remain unchanged.

grouped_source_admissions.consumption_boundary: Exact retained N29/N30 identities may motivate mechanisms and claims only at their original scope; they supply no repeated trail dynamics or L03 result.

grouped_source_admissions.visibility_boundary: These experiment labels are a validator-checked projection for discoverability. The digest-bound predecessor inventory remains the sole authority for mechanisms, source identities, paths, hashes, roles, and claim boundaries.
grouped_source_admissions.consumption_boundary: Exact source-backed producer and control patterns may guide an RCAE-owned completion. They cannot upgrade native capability or be copied without P2-I3-specific ownership, identity, and controls.

producer_extension_disposition.extension_pattern: An RCAE request producer may observe declared LGRC9V3 runtime-visible state and request public LGRC9V3 work; a declared-state producer may own only explicitly registered RCAE state and transitions. LGRC9V3 continues to own every invoked native transition.
producer_extension_disposition.repository_boundary: No producer may edit, monkey-patch, subclass in place, or mutate the graph/PyGRC repository. RCAE bridging code lives and is versioned only in RCAE.
producer_extension_disposition.transition_boundary: A later native PyGRC implementation does not silently replace a retained RCAE producer. Native substitution requires an explicit source transition, new realization identity, and rerun.
producer_extension_disposition.scientific_boundary: Producer completion is allowed only if it preserves the accepted dynamic-field-to-local-traversal question. A producer may not write the desired route, choose the successful outcome, or hide a global selector.
producer_extension_disposition.naturalization_debt: Every load-bearing RCAE-owned state, lifecycle, local-response, relocation, or participant-role pattern remains explicit graph-side naturalization debt.

substrate_authority.boundary: GRC9V3 and LGRC9V3 have distinct step ownership and per-step evolution/relaxation semantics. A GRC9V3 result may be retained as an interesting comparative result but cannot replace an LGRC9V3 implementation, satisfy the core L03 discriminator, or discharge an LGRC9V3 missing-surface obligation.
substrate_authority.bridge_rule: Calling GRC9V3.step or apply_continuity from an RCAE bridge does not turn that transition into LGRC9V3 behavior and is ineligible as a core realization.
substrate_authority.state_type_rule: GRC9V3State remains admitted because it is the public base-state type used by LGRC9V3; this does not admit synchronous GRC9V3 execution as the lane substrate.

callable_boundary_profiles.synchronous_grc: GRC9V3.apply_continuity and GRC9V3.step are genuine GRC operations, but P2-I3 targets LGRC9V3. Their different full-step evolution and relaxation semantics make them comparative-only; a bridge cannot promote them into an LGRC9V3 core realization.
callable_boundary_profiles.passive_surface_and_producer: Pulse-surface rows and feedback producers are evidence/scheduling infrastructure, not mutable field state or local traversal response.
callable_boundary_profiles.route_configuration: Route-aspect and causal-flux route configuration may register or validate geometry but cannot supply the preferred route or scientific response.
callable_boundary_profiles.restoration: Native identities cover only supported PyGRC state. Complete P2-I3 identity must later compose every RCAE-owned state and policy.
callable_boundary_profiles.relocation: Topology-lineage operations are nonqualifying references for fixed-topology field relocation.
callable_boundary_profiles.state_intervention: LGRC9V3.set_state is an implementation surface, not by itself an adequate pure intervention. Later controls must bind target fields and complete non-target equality.

preexisting_test_summary.role: Exact test definitions and accepted I01 conformance result only; no P2-I3 candidate or calibration evidence.

evidence_class_taxonomy.inherited_evidence: N29/N30, graph source, generic-test, and closeout facts retain their original claim ceilings.
evidence_class_taxonomy.ecology_interpretation: Theory and RCAE papers may define meaning, boundaries, and developmental reading but cannot establish runtime behavior.
evidence_class_taxonomy.constructed_mechanism: Predecessor producer patterns may justify feasibility only; any P2-I3 use remains explicitly RCAE-owned and rerunnable.
evidence_class_taxonomy.missing_surface: I01 absent or inadequate native lifecycle, local-response, intervention, relocation, and participant-role surfaces remain missing or inadequate after admission.
evidence_class_taxonomy.proposed_discriminator: The P2-I3 brief supplies the dynamic-field-to-local-traversal discriminator; admission does not show that it succeeds.

selected_resolution.question: Which exact theory and graph revisions, files, public callables, and evidence roles are admitted?
selected_resolution.answer: Admit the exact identities and bounded roles in this manifest. Consume semantically adequate native LGRC9V3 surfaces first; permit explicit RCAE producer completion from admitted precedents when LGRC9V3 coverage is absent or unsuitable; preserve every missing-surface and claim boundary. Retain GRC9V3 only as a possible comparative result, never as an LGRC9V3 substitute.
selected_resolution.next_decision: P2-I3-Q-003 through P2-I3-Q-008 at I03 realization selection

requirements: clean geometric-theory checkout at revision e0d25bf69b8bf681eb8d092ba416497030e5d88e
repository .venv with the already verified PyGRC import dependencies

reopening_conditions: A later realization needs a source or public callable not present in the exact admitted set.
A source-current graph revision changes a load-bearing callable, restoration identity, or missing-surface classification.
An admitted theory source changes in a way that alters P2-I3 meaning or claim boundaries.
A producer pattern cannot be reconstructed without an unadmitted predecessor source.
A later native transition is proposed for a retained RCAE producer.
The project owner changes the primary substrate from LGRC9V3 or authorizes a separately governed GRC9V3 comparative study.
